_provenance: Expected findings reconstructed from the canonical NIST CFReDS Data Leakage Case answer set (62-question roadmap). Built independently of this run's findings so that false-negatives (uncovered artifact categories) surface honestly. Not a verbatim copy of the NIST answer PDF (not fetched).

expected_findings.description: Operating system is Windows 7 Ultimate Service Pack 1, NTFS
PC timezone is Eastern (UTC-5 standard, UTC-4 EDT during incident)
Local user accounts informant, admin11, ITechTeam, temporary; informant is the subject RID 1000
Subject Outlook account is iaman.informant@nist.gov; mail client Outlook with OST
Spy Conspirator email address is spy.conspirator@nist.gov
Outlook email thread including deleted items discusses the leak plan, USB risk, and completion between informant and spy
Two files shared via Google Drive to Spy: pricing_decision.xlsx renamed happy_holiday.jpg and final_meeting.pptx renamed do_u_wanna_build_a_snow_man.mp3
Google Drive used for cloud exfiltration; snapshot.db / sync log cloud_entry records, files later removed locally
Network share source is \\10.11.11.128\secured_drive Secret Project Data
Confidential Secret Project Data documents: pricing decision, final meeting, design concept, proposal
USB device RM#1 authorized SanDisk Cruzer Fit serial 4C530012450531101593 attached; carried Secret Project Data
USB device RM#2 unauthorized SanDisk Cruzer Fit serial 4C530012550531106501 attached
RM#2 anti-forensics: confidential files renamed to innocuous names and deleted from FAT, recoverable
RM#3 CD-R burned labeled IAMAN CD; anti-forensics: confidential files hidden and renamed behind decoy images
CD-R burning performed on PC (Windows IMAPI / live file system) on 2015-03-24
PC anti-forensics on 2015-03-25: Eraser and CCleaner executed; Recycle Bin emptied
File renaming traces on Desktop 2015-03-23 to 24 with MFT entries overwritten
Resignation letter DOCX on informant Desktop, printed (XPS)
Thumbcache (thumbcache_256) contains traces of confidential files
Sticky Notes content recovered from informant profile
Windows Search index Windows.edb retains IE history, email and Desktop file content
Volume Shadow Copies preserve pre-wipe state including Google Drive snapshot.db cloud_entry deletions
Web browser history and search keywords related to data leakage / anti-forensics tools
Recycle Bin was emptied as anti-forensics
RM#2 deleted files recovered: confidential corpus mirroring the share directory structure
RM#3 hidden files recovered and original filenames determined (winter_whether_advisory.zip)
Subject informant is the sole actor; physically present (interactive logon) during the leakage
Full leakage timeline 2015-03-22 to 2015-03-25: planning, staging, exfiltration, cover-up

negative_assertions: No Windows event log clearing (no EID 1102) occurred
No remote access / RDP logon by an external actor
